news.t: US sets preliminary antidumping duties on solar imports from India, Indonesia and Laos

holdings.infoBox: SOLR is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are CASHUSD stock at 5.51%, INFINEON TECHNOLOGIES AG at 5.26%, PRYSMIAN SPA at 4.63%, IBERDROLA at 4.50%, and LEGRAND at 4.45%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Sustainable Energy ETF (SOLR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively-managed ETF of global stocks focused on alternative or renewable energy, held on approximately an equal-weighted basis. SOLR was launched on Nov 11, 2020 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.

data.title: US sets preliminary antidumping duties on solar imports from India, Indonesia and Laos
data.text: The U.S. Commerce Department on ​Thursday announced preliminary antidumping ‌duties on solar cells and panels imported ​from India, Indonesia ​and Laos, the latest ⁠in a ​string of tariffs imposed ​ov...
